footer.tagline: Compact wood-burning stoves for mobile homes, tiny houses and small refuges. Built to last, designed to make cold spaces livable.

home.heroBadge: Compact wood-burning stoves — First limited series
home.heroSubtitle: Compact heating appliances, built piece by piece, for vans, tiny houses and refuges that refuse to sacrifice comfort.
home.splitParticularDesc: Displayed prices, full product sheets, secure pre-order. Delivery across France and Europe.
home.splitProDesc: Van builders, resellers, distributors — tiered pricing, volumes, partnerships and exclusivities.
home.stripText: To guarantee this launch price and reduce our carbon footprint through grouped production and shipping, we are launching a first limited series. Production will begin once the pre-order target is reached.
home.collectionDesc: The Nomad 01 for compact spaces, the Cabin 03 for more generous volumes. Same material standards, same finish level.
home.valuesTitle:
Built to last.
Designed to fit.
home.valuesDesc: Every unit is assembled by hand. No dormant stock, no overproduction — we manufacture in batches, on demand, to deliver exactly what's needed, when it's ready.
home.valuesQuote: "We build stoves for people who lack space, not ambition."
home.fumiTitle:
Everything to connect
and fuel your stove
home.fumiDesc: Double-wall flue pipes, roof penetration kits, heat shields and coconut charcoal — a complete range for a clean installation from day one.
home.fumiPipesDesc: Single and double wall Ø 150 mm
home.preorderWhyDesc1: We only manufacture once a minimum number of pre-orders has been confirmed. This lets us avoid excess stock, optimise production and stay truly eco-responsible.
home.preorderWhyDesc2: By pre-ordering, you lock in the launch price, confirm your place in the first series, and receive your stove in July 2026.
home.step1Desc: Lock in your unit with a secure deposit. Price guaranteed regardless of future price changes.
home.step2Desc: Production starts once the minimum volume is reached. You are notified by email at every step.
home.step3Desc: Your unit is manufactured, quality-checked and shipped directly from the workshop.
home.ctaTitle:
Talk to us about
your project.
home.ctaDesc: Compatibility, installation, lead times — we answer everything before you decide.

particulier.heroDesc: Two appliances, one standard. Choose based on your heating volume, pre-order at launch price, receive in July 2026.
particulier.paymentInfo: Secure bank transfer · IBAN sent by email after booking
particulier.shippingInfo: Free shipping in France and Europe
particulier.paymentDesc: After your pre-order is confirmed, you receive the bank details by email to make your payment. No IBAN is ever displayed publicly.
particulier.shippingDesc: Free standard shipping for all orders in mainland France and the European Union. Tracking and insurance included.
particulier.ecoDesc: We only manufacture from a minimum pre-order volume. Each series is grouped and shipped together to minimise carbon impact.

product.specsDesc: All the data you need to evaluate and install the product.
product.docsDesc: Technical datasheets, installation guides and certifications available for free download.
product.ctaSecurityNote: Secure bank transfer. Bank details sent by email after your booking is confirmed.

fumisterie.title: Connection & fuel supply
fumisterie.desc: Flue pipes, connectors, roof penetrations, heat shields and coconut charcoal. Everything you need for a clean, safe and lasting installation. Compatible with Nomad 01 and Cabin 03.
fumisterie.compatNote: Double wall recommended for mobile installations
fumisterie.adviceDesc: Send us your installation plan (or even a photo of your van or tiny house) and we'll tell you exactly what to order. Free, no commitment.

histoire.heroDesc: NUKÖ was born from a long winter and a simple conviction: there was no truly compact, truly safe, truly well-designed stove for small spaces. So we built one.
histoire.originTitle: A van, a winter, a real problem
histoire.philosophyDesc: One perfectly mastered product is worth more than a broad, approximate range.
histoire.workshopDesc1: Every unit is assembled by hand in our Lorient workshop. No overseas subcontracting, no dormant stock: we manufacture in batches, on order, by the hands of those who designed the product.
histoire.workshopDesc2: This choice is not just a stance. It's what allows us to control every weld, every dimension, every gasket. And it's what makes our group pre-order model possible — less waste, less transport, more exigence.
histoire.testimonialsDesc: A few words from beta testers and partner builders who had the first prototypes in hand.
histoire.ctaDesc: One hundred units. One finish level. One launch price. Production starts once the target is reached.

precommande.heroDesc: Guaranteed launch price. Delivery expected July 2026. Production starts once the pre-order target is reached.
precommande.step1Desc: Choose your model and enter your details. Two minutes maximum.
precommande.step2Desc: An email is sent to you immediately with the reference, amount and bank details.
precommande.step3Desc: Standard bank transfer, confidential IBAN. Include your order reference in the payment description.
precommande.step4Desc: Once payment is received, you get your final confirmation. Delivery in July 2026.
precommande.securityText: Your IBAN is never displayed on this site. It is sent exclusively by encrypted email after your booking is confirmed. No banking data is stored.
precommande.questionText: Write to us at {email} or use the contact form.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyDesc: Browse the Nomad 01 in the shop to view the full product sheet and start your order.
cart.confirmNote: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive an email with the summary and next steps.

contact.title: Talk about a project, an order or an installation
contact.desc: We answer questions about orders, installation and project compatibility.
contact.extendedDesc: The most useful answers before an order, an installation or a first heating season.

professionnel.heroDesc: Van builders, specialist resellers and distributors: contact the workshop to learn about our terms, volumes and tiered pricing.

gauge.launchMessage: Production will launch once the target of 100 pre-orders is reached.
